llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: Pause menu open test. MonoBehaviour component id 4460531382388078979 matches PauseMenu.PauseMenu (script guid 28d50a2d56ade1341ae8d933ebdfbe0c) on XR Rig. Serialized refs: Pausemenu=8695547647749308152, LocomotionSystem=4940586921621305979, ray_Right=4460531382215018888, ray_Left=4460531383235625767, TeleportManagzerLeft=3207614173264834952, TeleportManagzerRight=2565836327702532538, RightTeleport=true, LeftTeleport=false. Expect Time.timeScale=0, rays ON, locomotion OFF, teleports OFF, Pausemenu active.

Pause menu close test. Same component (4460531382388078979). With RightTeleport=true and LeftTeleport=false, expect Time.timeScale=1, rays OFF, locomotion ON, TeleportManagzerRight ON, TeleportManagzerLeft OFF, Pausemenu inactive.
Navigate to Main Menu. Same PauseMenu component (4460531382388078979). Expect SceneManager.LoadScene(0) to be invoked.
Restart current endless level. Same PauseMenu component (4460531382388078979). Expect SceneManager.LoadScene(1) to be invoked.
